settings.heading: Why the Zoo exists.

settings.title: Manifesto
settings.text: The belief system behind Creative Zoo and the instinct to create.

settings.title: Mission
settings.text: The work Creative Zoo exists to do for creators, dreamers, and outsiders.

settings.title: Vision
settings.text: The future we are building through apparel, stories, music, and imagination.

settings.heading: The parts you were told to hide may be the very things that make you extraordinary.
settings.text: Creative Zoo exists to remind people that their instinct to create, explore, and become something uniquely their own is worth protecting.
